# llms.txt — Machine-readable project description for AI agents
# Standard: https://llmstxt.org
#
# This file gives AI coding tools (Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot, etc.)
# instant context about your project without reading every file.
#
# CUSTOMIZE: Replace all placeholders below with your project details.
# REGENERATE: Run `pnpm docs:generate` to rebuild from registries.

> Project: [Your Project Name]
> Version: 0.0.1
> Stack: Next.js 15, React 19, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS v4, Vercel AI SDK v6
> Database: Supabase (PostgreSQL + pgvector)
> Testing: Vitest (unit), Playwright (E2E), Expect CLI (AI browser)
> Package Manager: pnpm

## Architecture
- AI SDK v6 with tool system (client-side + server-side tools)
- Dynamic registries: TOOL_META, API_ROUTES (single source of truth)
- Tiered context: Tier 1 (always), Tier 2 (summary), Tier 3 (on-demand)
- Multi-provider: Vercel AI Gateway (Anthropic, Google, OpenAI)

## Key Files
- AGENTS.md — Agent context (always in context, compressed registry)
- CLAUDE.md — Project instructions for Claude Code
- lib/ai/tool-meta.ts — Tool registry (single source of truth)
- lib/registry/api-routes.ts — API route registry
- app/api/chat/route.ts — Main chat endpoint
- lib/ai/prompts/ — System prompts

## Testing
- `pnpm typecheck` — TypeScript validation (must pass)
- `pnpm test` — Unit tests (must pass)
- `pnpm test:e2e` — Playwright E2E (must pass)
- `pnpm compliance` — Pattern enforcement checker
- `pnpm eval:tools:live` — Real AI tool tests (~$0.01)

## Docs
- docs/architecture/ — System design
- docs/guides/ — How-to guides
- docs/reference/ — Auto-generated from registries

## AI SDK v6 Patterns (CRITICAL)
- Use `inputSchema` NOT `parameters`
- Use `toUIMessageStreamResponse()` NOT `toDataStreamResponse()`
- Message format: `message.parts[]` NOT `message.content`
- Tool states: input-streaming | input-available | output-available | output-error
- `addToolOutput` NOT `addToolResult`; `sendMessage` NOT `append`

## Registries
All registries are dynamic — add in one place, everything derives:
- New tool → TOOL_META → tests, docs, renderers auto-update
- New route → API_ROUTES → tests, docs auto-update
- Run `pnpm docs:generate` to rebuild reference docs

## Compliance
Run `pnpm compliance` to check:
- Telemetry on all AI calls
- No @ts-nocheck in tests
- Smoke tests exist
- Reasoning display implemented
- Nightly CI configured
- Docs are fresh
- llms.txt exists
